title: Madan Mohan Temple
tagline: Madan Mohan Temple — spiritual town of Rajasthan

overview.short: Shri Radha Madan Mohan Ji Temple is a Hindu temple situated at Karauli, in the Indian state of Rajasthan.
overview.description: Shri Radha Madan Mohan Ji Temple is a Hindu temple situated at Karauli, in the Indian state of Rajasthan. The temple is located on the banks of the Bhadravati River, a tributary of the Banas River in the hills of Aravali. It is located in the braj region. The temple is dedicated to Madan Mohan form of Krishna.

topPlaces.name: Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya, Karauli
topPlaces.description: Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya, Karauli, also known as JNV Jatnagla, is located in Hindaun Tehsil, Karauli district in Rajasthan state of India. Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya Karauli is a schools for talented children and forms a part of Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya group of nationwide government schools.

topPlaces.name: Jagar, Hindaun
topPlaces.description: Jagar is a Gram Panchayat in Hindaun Block, Karauli District, Rajasthan. Approximately 9000 people live there.

topPlaces.name: Suroth
topPlaces.description: Suroth is a tehsil in Hindaun Block, Karauli District, Rajasthan.

topPlaces.name: Hindaun
topPlaces.description: Hindaun is a city and municipality, near city of Karauli in Karauli district, Rajasthan, India. It has a population of 105690 and is governed by a municipal council.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Madan Mohan Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Madan Mohan Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 28–44°C and winters are 8–25°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Madan Mohan Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Agra Airport (Pandit Deen Dayal Upadhyay) (97 km) and the nearest railway station is Agra Cantt (100 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Madan Mohan Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Madan Mohan Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Madan Mohan Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Madan Mohan Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Madan Mohan Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya, Karauli, Jagar, Hindaun, Suroth, Hindaun.
